dialog.stepLabel: Phantom of a Man: "Ugh, the crops are all dead...."

items.speaker: Phantom of a Man
items.text: Ugh, the crops are all dead.

items.speaker: Phantom of a Man
items.text: Grandpa's notes mentioned the soil was too salty, but the pages with the solution got ruined during the TD Outbreak. If only Grandpa had lived longer...

items.speaker: Phantom of a Woman
items.text: Ugh, why didn't the Sentinel guide us to a better land...

items.speaker: Phantom of a Man
items.text: Don't be so ungrateful. If it wasn't for the Sentinel's help, our fleet would have been wiped out.

items.speaker: Phantom of a Man
items.text: From here on out, we must rely on ourselves. If one generation can't do it, we'll try with two. The land of Rinascita will be fertile again, I know it!

dialog.stepLabel: Phantom of a Young Man: "All-knowing and all-powerful Sentinel, please bless me with ..."

items.speaker: Phantom of a Young Man
items.text: All-knowing and all-powerful Sentinel, please bless me with smooth sailing tomorrow!

items.speaker: Phantom of an Old Woman
items.text: Instead of praying here every day, why don't you go fix the fishing boat?

items.speaker: Phantom of a Young Man
items.text: Grandma, how can you say such a disrespectful thing in front of the Sentinel!

items.speaker: Phantom of an Old Woman
items.text: That's not the Sentinel. It's nothing more than a pile of stones you've gathered.

items.speaker: Phantom of an Old Woman
items.text: The Sentinel guided us here to build a new home, yet you would dare lay every little misfortune at Their feet. It is you who dishonor the Sentinel.

items.speaker: Phantom of a Young Man
items.text: You don't understand anything, Grandma.

dialog.stepLabel: Celebrating Old Man: "Dance! Everyone, the time to celebrate is now!..."

items.speaker: Celebrating Old Man
items.text: Dance! Everyone, the time to celebrate is now!

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: This looks like a recording of an ancient Carnevale celebration. Since there's no Acolyte in sight… could it be from before the founding of the Order of the Deep? This is a marvelous discovery, {Male=Mr.;Female=Ms.} {PlayerName}!

items.speaker: Celebrating Old Man
items.text: Let us raise our thanks to the Sentinel, who has guided us to safety and protected us on this journey!

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: Yes, that's right! The Sentinel is truly a great and wondrous being!

items.speaker: Celebrating Young Man
items.text: And let us thank our hardworking farmers whose toil has transformed the soil, bringing us an abundant harvest!

items.speaker: Celebrating Young Woman
items.text: Let us honor the brave warriors who vanquished Tacet Discord and beast alike so that we might sleep soundly at night!

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: No, no! The Sentinel blessed us with fertile soil. The Sentinel gave us a home.

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: How dare they claim the Sentinel's blessings as their own!

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: S-such utter disgrace!
